lot_no: & River bank protective work along the left bank of Meghna river from km 129.267 to km 129.617 = 350 m in c/w "Protection work at the bank of Meghna river at Borokheri, Ludhuabazar and Kaderponditer hat areas in Ramgati and Kamal Nagar upazila under Lakshmipur District" Project in Upazila-Ramgati, Dist.-Lakshmipur under Lakshmipur O & M Division, BWDB, Lakshmipur (Package No: Lak/W-06/Lot-2/2021-22).
